story.text:
# 🏛️ the Rostra
**workshop** · swordsman · narrative

the Agora · Rhetor ⚔️⚖️ the Swordsman proclaims the ratified law in the open and guards it — the gate that cannot be charmed. Brother of Nomia at the Chancery (V36 ⊕ V27 = 63). Greek ῥήτωρ (orator). Founded in Tome IX Act 8.
> *A law spoken only in private is a wish; a law proclaimed and guarded is a wall.*
